edits.content:
[project]
name = "widget"
version = "0.2.10"
description = "FastAPI widget service scaffolded with uv"
authors = [
    { name = "Zack Teater", email = "zteater@gmail.com" }
]
requires-python = ">=3.12"
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.135.1",
    "uvicorn>=0.41.0",
]

[project.scripts]
widget = "widget:main"

[build-system]
requires = ["uv_build>=0.10.2,<0.11.0"]
build-backend = "uv_build"

[dependency-groups]
dev = [
    "httpx>=0.28.1",
    "pytest>=9.0.2",
    "ruff>=0.6.0",
]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

[tool.ruff]
